items.name_en: 💕《Full Original Green Box Packaging》💕GG👉《Gucci Cosmogonie》series debuted at the historic Castello di Monte Castello in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and geographical locations complement each other, connecting the past and the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, presented in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Green soft leather, shiny gold-tone hardware, inside: 1 zip pocket, this bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fixed to the bag via a buckle, adjustable top handle strap with double-G magnetic snap.
items.name_cn:
💕《Full Original Green Box Packaging》💕GG👉《Gucci Cosmogonie》series debuted at the historic Castello di Monte Castello in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and geographical locations complement each other, connecting the past and the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, presented in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Green soft leather, shiny gold-tone hardware, inside: 1 zip pocket, this bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fixed to the bag via a buckle, adjustable top handle strap with double-G magnetic snap.
Model: 726274.
Dimensions: 39(W) x 38(H) x 2(D).
Color: Green/Original Leather.

The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This beige and dark brown mini wallet reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from selected new GG monogram canvas. Carefully designed with multiple card slots, cleverly incorporating practical snap closure.
Model: 821802.
Dimensions: 19(L) x 11(W)
Color: Beige PVC/Original leather.
Italian creation

💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Oversized Mini Shoulder Bag
The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This beige and dark brown oversized mini shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from selected new GG monogram canvas. Carefully designed with multiple compartments, cleverly incorporating D-rings for hanging items.
◇Beige and dark brown new GG monogram coated canvas
. Brown leather trim
◇Taffeta lining
◇ Gucci embossed
◇Also comes with D-rings for hanging removable items
. Interior: 1 zip pocket, multiple card slots with flat pockets
. Adjustable shoulder strap (52cm high)
. Snap closure
Model: 820688.
Dimensions: 20(L) x 12.5(W) x 5(D)
Color: Beige PVC/Original leather.
Italian creation
